chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-749 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 09.09.2022. Mr. Ghulamullah Chang advocate for the applicants. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. Applicants are present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Applicants are alleged to have abducted Mst. Shazia wife of complainant against whom they had registered FIR bearing Crime No.68/2021, under Sections 496-A, 506 PPC contracting marriage during subsistence of first marriage when he and his wife were proceeding to Court for attending the case registered against them there. FIR is delayed for about one month without any explanation. Learned APG has confirmed that alleged abductee was recovered from house of complainant and in 164 CrPC statement has disclosed that she was left there by one Amja Ali who is not even accused in this case. Learned APG has opposed bail but has not disputed the above facts. Accordingly, in view of facts and circumstances as enumerated above malafide on the part of complainant cannot be ruled out, therefore, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants vide order 18.07.2022 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Irfan Ali
